batch_upload_reference.description: Reference identifying batch upload. Value does not have to be unique and can be reused. If the value is not sent, it will be generated automatically and returned in response.

inquiry_timestamp.description: timestamp indicating when this inquiry occurred; supported format is YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS+HH:MM; time zone info (+HH:MM) can be skipped in which case it is assumed that the value is in UTC

transactions.description: Array of transaction objects related to inquiry. Read more in: Transactions API
